# Captured interactive review panel for Q1 (the richest Layer B disagreement).
# Generated by scripts/render_review_panel.py from the committed sample JSONs.
# This is what a human reviewer sees during the pause step — not the
# line-oriented summary in review_approval.log / review_rejection_*.log.
#
# Sections in order: Key Facts → Derivation candidates → why_chosen (key:value)
#   → question header + trust profile → Source → Answer → SQL
#   → QA Summary (FLAGS vs HYPOTHESIS) → Layer A FLAGS → Layer B FLAGS + HYPOTHESIS.

                                                  Key facts — q1_gtv_idr_by_asset_oct_2025                                                  
┌──────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Time window      │ 2025-10-01 → 2025-11-01                                                                                               │
│ Source           │ fct_trading_daily                                                                                                     │
│ Grain            │ (transaction_date, asset_class)                                                                                       │
│ Filters          │ transaction_date >= '2025-10-01'; transaction_date < '2025-11-01'                                                     │
│ Aggregator       │ SUM — SUM because gtv_idr is per-(transaction_date, asset_class) row, summable across days.                           │
│ Answer shape     │ breakdown                                                                                                             │
└──────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                                     Derivation — candidates considered                                                     
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ Table                   ┃ Grain                      ┃ Match         ┃ Scope feasibility         ┃ Selected ┃ Rejection reason           ┃
┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
│ fct_trading_daily       │ (transaction_date,         │ exact         │ ok   October 2025:        │ selected │                            │
│                         │ asset_class)               │               │ feasible_via=transaction_ │          │                            │
│                         │                            │               │ date >= '2025-10-01' AND  │          │                            │
│                         │                            │               │ transaction_date <        │          │                            │
│                         │                            │               │ '2025-11-01'              │          │                            │
│ agg_monthly_biz_summary │ (month, asset_class)       │ rollup_needed │ ok   October 2025:        │    -     │ Grain rollup needed;       │
│                         │                            │               │ feasible_via=month >=     │          │ requires aggregation by    │
│                         │                            │               │ '2025-10-01' AND month <  │          │ transaction_date.          │
│                         │                            │               │ '2025-11-01'              │          │                            │
│ mart_ops_dashboard      │ (month, asset_class)       │ rollup_needed │ ok   October 2025:        │    -     │ Grain rollup needed;       │
│                         │                            │               │ feasible_via=month >=     │          │ requires aggregation by    │
│                         │                            │               │ '2025-10-01' AND month <  │          │ transaction_date.          │
│                         │                            │               │ '2025-11-01'              │          │                            │
└─────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────┴───────────────┴───────────────────────────┴──────────┴────────────────────────────┘
╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────── why_chosen (planner-derived) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│  Required grain       (transaction_date, asset_class)                                                                                    │
│  Scope predicates     October 2025                                                                                                       │
│  Chosen source        fct_trading_daily                                                                                                  │
│    grain match        exact                                                                                                              │
│    scope feasibility  ok   October 2025: feasible_via=transaction_date >= '2025-10-01' AND transaction_date < '2025-11-01'               │
│  Rejected candidates  agg_monthly_biz_summary (Grain rollup needed; requires aggregation by transaction_date.); mart_ops_dashboard       │
│                       (Grain rollup needed; requires aggregation by transaction_date.)                                                   │
│  Aggregator           SUM — SUM because gtv_idr is per-(transaction_date, asset_class) row, summable across days.                        │
│  Filters              transaction_date >= '2025-10-01'                                                                                   │
│                       transaction_date < '2025-11-01'                                                                                    │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────── q1_gtv_idr_by_asset_oct_2025 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ What was total GTV (IDR) by asset class in October 2025?                                                                                 │
│                                                                                                                                          │
│ Trust profile: RED                                                                                                                       │
│   correctness=GREEN  source=RED  ambiguity=GREEN                                                                                         │
│                                                                                                                                          │
│ Layer A is clean. Layer B indicates a cross-source DISAGREEMENT in 3 findings — the mart_ops_dashboard shows higher GTV due to pending   │
│ transactions included, with a HIGH confidence hypothesis explaining the observed delta of +13.71%.                                       │
│                                                                                                                                          │
│ Unresolved questions:                                                                                                                    │
│   • Determine which source is authoritative regarding the treatment of pending transactions in GTV calculations.                         │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Source ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Primary table: fct_trading_daily                                                                                                         │
│ Why chosen: Picked fct_trading_daily because grain (transaction_date, asset_class) matches required (transaction_date, asset_class), and │
│ every scope predicate (October 2025) is feasible on it. Rejected: agg_monthly_biz_summary (Grain rollup needed; requires aggregation by  │
│ transaction_date.); mart_ops_dashboard (Grain rollup needed; requires aggregation by transaction_date.). Filters: transaction_date >=    │
│ '2025-10-01'; transaction_date < '2025-11-01'. Aggregator: SUM (SUM because gtv_idr is per-(transaction_date, asset_class) row, summable │
│ across days.).                                                                                                                           │
│ Alternatives available: agg_monthly_biz_summary, mart_ops_dashboard                                                                      │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ [                                                                                                                                        │
│   {                                                                                                                                      │
│     "asset_class": "crypto",                                                                                                             │
│     "gtv_idr": 18266056774                                                                                                               │
│   },                                                                                                                                     │

│     "gtv_idr": 4200105434                                                                                                                │
│   },                                                                                                                                     │
│   {                                                                                                                                      │
│     "asset_class": "gold",                                                                                                               │
│     "gtv_idr": 7726000162                                                                                                                │
│   },                                                                                                                                     │
│   {                                                                                                                                      │
│     "asset_class": "gss",                                                                                                                │
│     "gtv_idr": 6079313037                                                                                                                │
│   },                                                                                                                                     │
│   {                                                                                                                                      │
│     "asset_class": "options",                                                                                                            │
│     "gtv_idr": 1868303555                                                                                                                │
│   }                                                                                                                                      │
│ ]                                                                                                                                        │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── SQL ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ SELECT                                                                                                                                   │
│   asset_class,                                                                                                                           │
│   SUM(gtv_idr) AS gtv_idr                                                                                                                │
│ FROM fct_trading_daily                                                                                                                   │
│ WHERE                                                                                                                                    │
│   transaction_date >= '2025-10-01' AND transaction_date < '2025-11-01'                                                                   │
│ GROUP BY                                                                                                                                 │
│   asset_class                                                                                                                            │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭────────────────────────────────────────── QA Summary — flag first, hypothesise where grounded ───────────────────────────────────────────╮
│  FLAGS (what we know)          Layer A 9/9 pass  |  Layer B DISAGREEMENT — 3 findings (max |Δ| 13.71%)                                   │
│  HYPOTHESIS (what we suspect)  HIGH — mart_ops_dashboard's higher GTV reflects pending transactions being included via status !=         │
│                                'failed'.                                                                                                 │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
                                              Layer A — FLAGS (deterministic checks)  9/9 pass                                              
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ Check                                                              ┃ Result                         ┃ Detail / evidence                  ┃
┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
│ non_empty_result                                                   │ PASS                           │                                    │
│ no_required_nulls                                                  │ PASS                           │                                    │
│ no_negative_for_always_positive                                    │ PASS                           │                                    │
│ no_zero_for_must_be_positive                                       │ PASS                           │                                    │
│ required_columns_present                                           │ PASS                           │                                    │
│ no_aggregate_member_in_breakdown                                   │ NOT_APPLICABLE                 │                                    │
│ metric_value_matches_result_rows                                   │ PASS                           │                                    │
│ source_matches_validated_plan                                      │ PASS                           │                                    │
│ plausible_range                                                    │ PASS                           │                                    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────┘
                                        Layer B — FLAGS: DISAGREEMENT (cross-source reconciliation)                                         
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ Source                                        ┃ Value                      ┃ Δ vs primary ┃ Notes                                        ┃
┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
│ fct_trading_daily.gtv_idr (canonical primary) │ {                          │           0% │ Reference value for cross-source comparison. │
│                                               │   "crypto": 18266056774.0, │              │                                              │
│                                               │   "fx": 4200105434.0,      │              │                                              │
│                                               │   "gold": 7726000162.0,    │              │                                              │
│                                               │   "gss": 6079313037.0,     │              │                                              │
│                                               │   "options": 1868303555.0  │              │                                              │
│                                               │ }                          │              │                                              │
│ agg_monthly_biz_summary.gtv_idr               │ {                          │           0% │ Monthly aggregate sourced from               │
│                                               │   "crypto": 18266056774.0, │              │ fct_trading_daily; should match exactly when │
│                                               │   "fx": 4200105434.0,      │              │ summed by asset_class.                       │
│                                               │   "gold": 7726000162.0,    │              │                                              │
│                                               │   "gss": 6079313037.0,     │              │                                              │
│                                               │   "options": 1868303555.0  │              │                                              │
│                                               │ }                          │              │                                              │
│ mart_ops_dashboard.gtv_idr                    │ {                          │      +13.71% │ Ops mart filters status != 'failed'          │
│                                               │   "crypto": 20713210819.0, │              │ (includes pending). Expected to be HIGHER    │
│                                               │   "fx": 4616334573.0,      │              │ than fct_trading_daily by ~10-15%.           │
│                                               │   "gold": 8565045433.0,    │              │                                              │
│                                               │   "gss": 6698913201.0,     │              │                                              │
│                                               │   "options": 2124534665.0  │              │                                              │
│                                               │ }                          │              │                                              │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────┴──────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────┘
╭───────────────────────────────────────────── HYPOTHESIS (LLM-suspected, evidence-grounded) ──────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Proposal (HIGH): mart_ops_dashboard's higher GTV reflects pending transactions being included via status != 'failed'.                    │
│                                                                                                                                          │
│ Evidence:                                                                                                                                │
│   • Ops note: 'filters status != failed (includes pending). Expected to be HIGHER by ~10-15%'                                            │
│   • Observed ops delta = +13.7146%, within the expected 10-15% range                                                                     │
│   • agg_monthly_biz_summary matches fct exactly (delta 0%), confirming fct is the canonical completed-transaction source                 │
│                                                                                                                                          │
│ What this does NOT explain: None — the per-source notes fully explain the observed pattern.                                              │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
